title: Delete/remove a Feature from an App?
excerpt:
I was trying to follow Quickstart guide while experimenting, and I ended up with this in the sidebar: 
 
Good - so I have a feature, “New App - Item View”. 
How can I delete/remove this feature, while keeping the app?

posts.author: sdbbs (sdbbs)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was trying to follow Quickstart guide while experimenting, and I ended up with this in the sidebar:

Good - so I have a feature, “New App - Item View”.

How can I delete/remove this feature, while keeping the app?

posts.author: sdbbs (sdbbs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ah, it was well hidden - three dots at the Feature Details screen hides the “Delete Feature” command:

image700×300 17.9 KB
